title: henckelia ridleyana
intro: Henckelia ridleyana, also known as the Ridley's henckelia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. This plant is native to the tropical forests of Malaysia and is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Henckelia ridleyana include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments.
